import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let target_opt = io.read_line()
  match target_opt
  when Some(t)
    let body = io.read_to_end()
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(body)
    mut count = 0
    for tok in tokens
      if tok == t
        count = count + 1
      end
    end
    println("count=#{count}")
  when None
    println("count=0")
  end
end
